scopes.title: OAuth Scopes
scopes.description: OAuth scopes to request (e.g., openid, profile, email, Directory.Read.All)

groupSyncEnabled.title: Enable Group Sync
groupSyncEnabled.description: Fetch user groups from Azure AD and map to workspace roles

avatarSyncEnabled.title: Enable Avatar Sync
avatarSyncEnabled.description: Sync user profile photo from Azure AD

groupFilters.title: Group Filters
groupFilters.description: Optional: Only sync these group display names

groupMappingRules.title: Group Mapping Rules
groupMappingRules.description: Map Azure AD group objectIds to workspace roles (admin, member, viewer)

validateIssuer.title: Validate Token Issuer
validateIssuer.description: Verify token issuer matches configured tenant

requireEmailDomainMatch.title: Require Email Domain Match
requireEmailDomainMatch.description: Only allow users whose email matches tenant domain (optional security control)

allowedEmailDomains.title: Allowed Email Domains
allowedEmailDomains.description: Whitelist specific email domains (if requireEmailDomainMatch enabled)
